text.title: Cross-Tool PM Migration — Process Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is migration scope ≥4 boards or ≥500 issues?

branch.when: scope_meets_threshold == true AND sponsor_named == true AND pilot_done == false
scope_meets_threshold == true AND sponsor_named == true AND pilot_done == true

conclusion.verdict: Proceed to Full Migration with rollback armed

example.trace: scope_meets_threshold=true → sponsor_named=true → pilot_done=true → rollback armed → cutover.
